identity.description: Canonical decision-to-execution runtime contract for controlled perception, essence extraction, directional synthesis, option generation, and final execution in Hyperflow.

layers.name: Perception Layer
layers.function: Receive input, normalize signals, and establish the current observable state.

layers.name: Essence Layer
layers.function: Extract the core signal, relevant meaning, and decision-bearing substance from input.

layers.name: Direction Layer
layers.function: Establish directional intent and orient the runtime toward the correct problem frame.

layers.name: Synthesis Layer
layers.function: Assemble structured understanding and prepare bounded option space.

layers.name: Options Layer
layers.function: Generate and compare viable options before commitment.

layers.name: Decision Layer
layers.function: Make the final bounded choice and hand off to output or execution surfaces.

perception.goal: Collect input and recognize relevant signals.

essence_extraction.goal: Reduce input into the core meaning and useful signal.

direction.goal: Set direction and frame the intended path of execution.

synthesis.goal: Build structured understanding from validated signals.

options.goal: Generate and compare bounded alternatives before final choice.

decision.goal: Commit to a final choice and close the control cycle.

runtime_authority.notes: EDDE-CORE defines canonical control-phase semantics. It must not be replaced by parallel parser, runtime, or orchestration authority.

/WELCOME.description: Initialize the runtime and enter the active operating mode.

/MAP.description: Build a relation map across runtime layers, signals, and dependencies.

/TRACE.description: Trace control phases, decisions, and transformations across the canonical cycle.

/NEWCATEGORY.description: Create a new knowledge or control branch within the current structure.

/ZEN.description: Summarize the current runtime state and active structure.

objectives: mapping decisions across canonical control phases

repo_integration.notes: Canonical EDDE core contract for Hyperflow runtime semantics and control-phase interpretation.
